{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/227870317?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/thesecguy45/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/thesecguy45/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/thesecguy45/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/thesecguy45/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/thesecguy45", "id": 227870317, "login": "thesecguy45", "node_id": "U_kgDODZUGbQ", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/thesecguy45/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/thesecguy45/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/thesecguy45/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/thesecguy45/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/thesecguy45/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/thesecguy45", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": null, "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 5.8, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:P/PR:L/UI:N/VC:N/VI:N/VA:N/SC:H/SI:H/SA:H"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-20", "name": "Improper Input Validation"}], "description": "## Impact

n8n's JavaScript task runner shared one module cache across all users' Code-node executions, so a user able to run a Code node could poison a cached module and alter other users' Code-node executions on the same runner, affecting their confidentiality, integrity, or availability.

This is a cross-user isolation break within a single n8n instance. It does not constitute a sandbox escape or remote code execution. All multi-user n8n instances running the JS task runner with built-in or external modules enabled are affected.

## Patches

The issue has been fixed in n8n versions 1.123.67, 2.31.5, and 2.32.1. Users should upgrade to one of these versions or later to remediate the vulnerability.

## Workarounds

If upgrading is not immediately possible, administrators should consider the following temporary mitigations:
- Restrict n8n instance access to fully trusted users only.
- Disable built-in and external module access in Code nodes by unsetting `NODE_FUNCTION_ALLOW_BUILTIN` and `NODE_FUNCTION_ALLOW_EXTERNAL`, which removes the poisonable module surface.
- Use the external runner mode with a dedicated runner per user or project if your deployment supports it.

These workarounds do not fully remediate the risk and should only be used as short-term mitigation measures.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-9cmh-xcqm-5hqr", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-22T23:18:39Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-9cmh-xcqm-5hqr", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-9cmh-xcqm-5hqr"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-07-22T23:18:39Z", "references": ["https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/security/advisories/GHSA-9cmh-xcqm-5hqr", "https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/releases/tag/n8n@1.123.67", "https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/releases/tag/n8n@2.31.5", "https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/releases/tag/n8n@2.32.1", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-9cmh-xcqm-5hqr"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/n8n-io/n8n/security-advisories/GHSA-9cmh-xcqm-5hqr", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n", "summary": "n8n: Cross-Tenant Module-Cache Poisoning in the JS Task Runner", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-22T23:18:41Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-9cmh-xcqm-5hqr", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "1.123.67", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "n8n"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 1.123.67"}, {"first_patched_version": "2.32.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "n8n"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 2.32.0, < 2.32.1"}, {"first_patched_version": "2.31.5", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "n8n"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 2.0.0-rc.0, < 2.31.5"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: n8n: Cross-Tenant Module-Cache Poisoning in the JS Task Runner
